{{- partialCached "head.html" . }} {{- if .IsHome }} {{- site.Title }} {{- else }} {{- printf "%s | %s" (or .Title $.Title) site.Title }} {{- end }}
{{- with default "img/huggingface-logo-48x48.png" site.Params.huggingface.siteLogo }} {{- with resources.Get . }} {{- end }} {{- end }}
{{- partial "header/menu.html" (dict "menuID" "main" "page" .) -}}
{{- with site.Params.h4h.repository }} {{- end }}
{{- block "main" . }}{{- end }}

{{- with .GitInfo }}{{- .AbbreviatedHash }}{{- end }}

© {{ now.Year }}. Irkode <github.com/irkode>

{{ .Lastmod.Format "2006-01-02" }}
